programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc:
Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will tackle the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations.
For years, the Iban people living in Borneo were considered one of the most terrifying communities in the world.Its members carried out ritual hunts for people.They believed that a warrior who shed blood gained strength and glory.Nowadays, this tradition is no longer cultivated, but its traces still remain in Iban homes.They never got rid of the trophies they won years ago.Martyna Wojciechowska talks to a descendant of bounty hunters.He also takes part in the skull taming ritual.

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc:
Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will tackle the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations.
Martyna Wojciechowska talks to Morena Herrera, who fights for women's rights in El Salvador.The country ranks first in terms of the number of murders of women.About 500 such cases are reported annually, with a population of less than 3 million.More than half of the victims of violence do not seek help and do not reveal the truth even to their closest family members.Moreover, El Salvador has one of the most restrictive anti-abortion laws in the world.Termination of pregnancy is always illegal.If a woman loses a child in unclear circumstances, she immediately becomes a suspect.The penalty for her ranges from 2 to 8 years, and if found guilty, she may be imprisoned for 50 years.A doctor can be sentenced to 6 to 12 years for performing an abortion.Anyone who knew about the situation but did not inform the authorities is also complicit.

programs.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programs.desc:
Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places
There is a place in downtown Los Angeles that tourists and locals alike stay away from.Tens of thousands of people who have become homeless camp every day in the Skid Row district.Pastor Troy runs a center that helps people in crisis of homelessness get back on their feet.Marcin learns the story of a priest who also struggled with a serious life crisis and now devotes all his energy to supporting others.The leader continues his journey to Slab City, a settlement located on the site of a former military base inhabited by those who want to live on their own terms.

programs.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programs.desc:
Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places
Marcin will meet with Carrie, a representative of the Mormon community, to find out what their faith is based on.This church was founded in 1830, and its followers, fleeing from persecution, settled in Utah and founded the city of Salt Lake City.The guide will also take the leader to meet his family.This will be an opportunity to find out whether the controversies that have been stirring up the lifestyle of followers of this religion for years and the myths circulating about it are confirmed in reality.

programs.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programs.desc:
Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places
Marcin Prokop will meet a man who gave up the pursuit of a career and money in favor of a sense of freedom and communion with nature.An American Air Force pilot gave up everything to live in a small truck and constantly travel.The host talks to him about where this idea came from and whether he regrets it.The journalist will also reach Zion National Park.Kim, who works as a guide in this place, will tell Marcin about what being close to nature gives him and why he is guided by the wabi-sabi philosophy.

programs.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programs.desc:
Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places
The presenter goes to Denver to meet with representatives of the Soldiers of Jesus.They say about themselves that they exist to train faithful disciples, preach the word of God and bear witness to the Gospel among the motorcyclist community.One of the members of the organization, Smoking Mike, tells Marcin about his dark past and the path he had to take to finally find peace and happiness.The leader continues his journey to meet Amberley, who suffered a spinal injury several years earlier as a result of an accident and uses a wheelchair.Thanks to her passion and religion, she found the strength to put her life back together.She is still an active rodeo competitor and horses are her great love.
